today.mock_card.title: Mock interview
today.mock_card.body: The most direct way to test yourself — take an AI-mock with an interviewer for a specific company. Each section is graded, and the run ends with a summary report.
today.daily_brief.title: Daily brief
today.daily_brief.offline: Coach is offline right now — daily brief unavailable. Normal without an OpenRouter key in dev.
today.coach_insight.title: AI-coach insight
today.coach_insight.empty: No fresh insights. They show up after mocks and focus sessions — finish a couple in a row and the coach catches up.
today.atlas_weak.title: Weak nodes
today.atlas_weak.empty: Atlas is empty or you're just starting. Open the full graph to see the map of topics.
today.atlas_weak.ctx_template: Student is working on node «{{title}}» ({{section}}). Progress {{pct}}%. Explain what matters to close the gap.

tutors_discover.title: Find an open tutor
tutors_discover.subtitle: Free, no payments and no hourly rates. Send an application — the tutor replies, and you start working on the chosen track.
tutors_discover.empty_filters: No public tutors match these filters yet.
tutors_discover.empty_hint: Try clearing filters or come back later — tutors appear as they open their profiles.
tutors_discover.application_sent_body: The tutor will see it on their dashboard. If they accept — you'll show up in their student list and can start working.
tutors_discover.apply_subtitle: Free. Tell the tutor what you're studying and what help you need — that helps them decide if you're a fit.
tutors_discover.message_placeholder: What do you want to level up? What's your current experience?

podcasts_full.title: What to put on in the background
podcasts_full.body_suffix: on interview prep, senior IT, ML, English. Listen on the go — every completed episode is logged into your trajectory.
podcasts_full.empty_body: Catalog is empty or nothing matches the filter.

memory_full.title: What AI remembers
memory_full.subtitle: Full list of memory entries the coach relies on. Delete an entry — AI no longer uses it in the next session. This is your memory; you decide what AI keeps.
memory_full.empty_body: Coach hasn't recorded anything yet. Entries will appear after the first session / mock / diagnostic.
memory_full.delete_title: AI will no longer use this

legal_terms.title: druz9 Terms of Use
legal_terms.section1.p: druz9 is an ecosystem of three products: druz9.ru (web arena, ranking, mock interviews), Hone (desktop focus cockpit), and Cue (stealth AI-copilot). All three run under a single account and a single subscription.
legal_terms.section2.p: Registration is via Yandex ID or Telegram. We don't store emails or passwords. You're responsible for keeping access to your provider account (Yandex/Telegram) safe; a compromised provider account = compromised druz9 account.
legal_terms.section3.p: Pro costs 790 ₽/month and unlocks AI features across the ecosystem (daily plan generation, AI whiteboard critique, link suggestions in notes, stealth copilot in Cue, Arena Pro on druz9.ru). Cancel anytime in profile settings; after cancellation Pro stays active until the end of the paid period.
legal_terms.section4.p_pre: Notes and whiteboard state are visible only to you, encrypted at rest, and never enter Arena / ranking / public collections. Focus sessions are used to build private stats and never shared with third parties. Details — see
legal_terms.section5.li1: Automated requests to AI endpoints by bots / scripts.
legal_terms.section5.li2: Attempts to bypass rate limits (10 req/min for Suggest, 1/5 min for GeneratePlan force-regeneration).
legal_terms.section5.li3: Reverse-engineering of binary artifacts (Hone DMG, Cue binary), publishing modified builds.
legal_terms.section5.li4: Content farming to manipulate the ranking.
legal_terms.section6.p: AI replies (plan, critique, mock feedback) are best-effort language model output, not a replacement for real review / preparation. Treat them as hints, not as a source of truth. We're not liable for decisions made based on AI output.
legal_terms.section7.p: You can delete your account anytime from profile settings — notes, sessions, subscription are wiped. We can disable an account for violating clause 5 or on suspicion of fraud/compromise, with a notice via the contact channel you provided.
legal_terms.section8.p: Term changes are published here, the update date is at the top. Material changes (subscription price, free tier scope) are announced 30 days in advance via your contact channel or in the app.
legal_terms.footer_note: This text is a minimum working contract for public beta; final lawyer review will be done before the public v1 launch date.

task_board.no_tasks_b: AI-coach is analysing your activity and will soon suggest personal tasks

trajectory_card.empty: Log is empty. Every logged activity shows up here as a point on the trajectory. After 7-14 days you'll see week-vs-week trend.

goal_readiness.no_goal_body: Without a goal the coach drifts. Set one — and get a deterministic readiness % + weekly milestones + a predictive plan.

goal_readiness.coach_high: Open Coach — test yourself on a mock →

daily_plan_card.no_goal_body: Set a goal — and get 3-5 actions adapted to your readiness and weak area.
daily_plan_card.hone_title: Open Hone and start a pomodoro for this action
